title: WhatsApp Just Announced Four New Features, Including a Huge Upgrade for CarPlay and Android Auto
summary: Unfortunately, that wasn't really the case with WhatsApp's previous experience in the car : You could send new messages and place WhatsApp calls, but that's it, and that made WhatsApp a much more limiting experience than other car chat apps.
